titleStmt.title: SII 9.526: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 526. (A.R. No. 619 of 1904.) ON THE SOUTH, EAST AND NORTH WALLS OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE OF THE VEDANARAYANASVAMI TEMPLE AT NAGALAPURAM, PONNERI TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated the cyclic year Sarvadhāri, Māgha, śu. 3, corresponding to A.D. 1529 January 13, Wednesday (not verifiable), in the reign of Kṛishṇarāya-Mahārāya. It records that the services of the god Vēdagiri-Perumāḷ should be conducted as detailed in the copper-plate document granted for the purpose and that the expenditure should be met from the income of the villages granted for the purpose. It also states that the fine levied from the culprits who removed the boundary stones should be given to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
sarvvadhārisaṁvatsarada māgha śu 3 lu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparemēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrakṛṣṇarāyamahārāyaru virupayaṇa yappa nāgalādēvi Aramanepura dēvastānakkeŪ AṣṭamāṁśadanitakkeŪ naṁma rāyasa prakāradale hākida śāsana yelleka da kallugaḷanu kittuhākida durjanaru mūvvarige takka kaṭṭu māḍi Avara mēlaṇa lekkada hoṁnanū koṁḍu guḍige koḍisūdu Aṣṭamāṁśakke modalu viṁgaḍisi koṭṭa gadde mānyanelanū Allade mikkāda nelanū guḍiya viniyōgadavara jītakke viṁgaḍisūdu viṣṇustānadalli durjanaru māḍida Akrutyagaḷanu biḍisi saṁnidhimēlaṇa vēdagiriperumāḷige tiruṇāḷanu sāgisi pūjeyanu māḍisūdu guḍige Uṁṭāda kaṭaḷḷegeŪ tiruvaḷiyāṭa grāmagaḷigeŪ cātina cātāḷavayiṣṇavarigeŪ kriṣṇarāya modali dinadalli Avanige naḍada stānanirvāha Ubhaya grāmagaḷigeŪ hiṁdakke naṁma rāyana tāṁbraśāsana pālisi naḍada mariyāde yogalu naḍava hāge kaṭṭaḷeya māḍe cittayisteU Ā mariyādele naḍasibahudu Ā mariyādele yellavanu naḍasi bahāge kaṭṭaḷeya māḍuvudu Aṣṭamāṁśadavarige hiṁdakke viṁgaḍisi koṭṭa staḷadale yihāge kaṭṭaḷeya māḍūdu dēvara pūja punaskāra Aṁgaraṁgavayibhōgagaḷanū
sāṁgavāgi naḍasūdu nāū hiṁdakke dēvastānakke Ubhayakaṭṭaḷe modalāgi tiruvaḷeyāṭakaṁ kaṭṭaḷeya māḍe cittayista śīmegaḷu voṁdaralū kaḍameyillada hāge naḍasūdu Āgi Ā stitiyanu nirūpa cittayistau śrīvirupākṣa .
Digital edition of SII 9.526 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
